description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a small lawn, and a main entryway with a covered porch. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by stone retaining walls and landscaped greenery. Large windows span both floors, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The side yards are terraced with retaining walls and steps, and a single tree is visible in the landscaping. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, straight lines, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front garage, and a backyard pool with landscaped terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and a small lawn with a tree on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the terraced landscaping, side steps, and partial view of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, swimming pool, extensive windows, and stone retaining walls.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible steps, retaining walls, and a tree in the side yard, plus the pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entry with steps, modern door, and a small porch area adjacent to the garage
